description_long: This is a large, modern house complex surrounded by a perimeter of trees and fencing, featuring multiple flat-roofed structures with green roofing and expansive glass windows. The property includes a spacious driveway, a detached garage, and several landscaped garden areas with palm trees and shrubs. At the rear, there is a large rectangular swimming pool with a deck and lounge area, as well as a secondary, smaller pool or water feature. The house is composed of interconnected volumes, creating a dynamic layout with open courtyards and terraces. The exterior is finished in a combination of light-colored walls, dark trim, and green roofing, giving it a contemporary and eco-friendly appearance. The overall design emphasizes open space, outdoor living, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, multi-volume house with flat green roofs, large glass windows, landscaped gardens, and a swimming pool, all enclosed by trees and fencing. The design features open courtyards, terraces, and a spacious driveway with a detached garage.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, driveway, detached garage, and landscaped front yard with palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the interconnected house volumes, green roofs, and the driveway curving around the property.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the large swimming pool, deck area, and extensive glass windows facing the backyard.
description_view_3: Angled view displays the relationship between the garage, main house, and outdoor pool area, with visible garden landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide, flat approach with a modern door, minimal steps, and landscaped flanking areas; no porch or columns, emphasizing clean lines and openness.
